name: Apostrophe
description: Full-stack Node.js CMS with in-context editing and headless architecture

description.value: Full-featured, open-source CMS combining in-context editing and headless architecture in a full-stack JavaScript environment

cms-type.comment: Supports both in-context editing with built-in frontend and headless API-driven architecture

deployment-model.comment: Open source self-hosted plus managed hosting options starting at $39/month

database-support.comment: MongoDB is the only supported database

api-type.comment: REST API only; GraphQL support mentioned as coming soon

multi-tenancy.comment: Available via Apostrophe Assembly multisite extension (paid)

static-site-generation.comment: Dynamic CMS; can work with SSG frameworks like Astro in headless mode but no built-in static generation

edge-deployment.comment: No built-in edge deployment; requires Node.js runtime

content-types.comment: Custom pieces and page types with full schema control

custom-fields.comment: Extensive field type system including string, integer, boolean, date, array, object, and custom types

field-types.comment: Includes areas, widgets, relationships, and array fields

content-relationships.comment: Relationship fields supporting one-to-many and many-to-many

nested-components.comment: Widgets and areas allow nested reusable components

localization.comment: Built-in i18n with static and dynamic localization; used by Michelin across 50+ countries

content-validation.comment: Field-level validation rules in schema definitions

embedded-interactives.comment: Custom widgets can embed interactive content; JSX widget support available

content-versioning.comment: Versions module allows restoring previous document versions; enhanced in Pro tier

draft-publish.comment: Documents exist in draft and live versions; commit workflow to publish

approval-workflows.comment: Submit for review workflow; Contributors create drafts, Editors approve and publish

content-locking.comment: No explicit content locking feature documented

media-library.comment: Built-in media library with attachment field type

image-transformations.comment: Automatic scaling to multiple sizes; cropping and focal point tools; not true on-the-fly but pre-generated

external-media-storage.comment: UploadFS supports S3, Azure, and GCS backends

video-support.comment: Video widget for embedding external videos; file uploads support video

svg-support.comment: SVG files can be uploaded via attachment field

folder-organization.comment: Media can be organized and tagged

role-based-access.comment: Built-in roles: Admin, Editor, Contributor, Guest

granular-permissions.comment: Advanced Permissions extension available in Pro tier for field-level and content-type permissions

sso-saml.comment: SAML/Shibboleth support via apostrophe-saml module; OAuth and Google Workspace integration

team-collaboration.comment: Submission workflow with notifications; submitted drafts inbox

audience-restrictions.comment: Login-required page protections and user group restrictions

typescript-sdk.comment: TypeScript SDK generated via OpenAPI spec; core CMS itself is JavaScript with improving TypeScript support

content-type-sdk.comment: Content types defined in code via module configuration

cli-tools.comment: @apostrophecms/cli for project creation and management tasks

local-development.comment: Full local development with Node.js and MongoDB

plugin-system.comment: Comprehensive module architecture; npm-scoped core modules and extensions marketplace

admin-ui-customization.comment: Admin UI built with Vue 3; customizable via modules

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with guides, tutorials, API reference, and cookbook; active maintenance

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official Astro integration; other frameworks via headless REST API

preview-mode.comment: In-context editing provides live preview; draft preview in headless mode

ecommerce-integration.comment: No official e-commerce integrations; would require custom development

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; requires custom integration

ai-features.comment: AI-driven automatic translation via DeepL, Google Cloud Translation, Azure

cdn-included.comment: No built-in CDN; requires external CDN setup

response-caching.comment: Built-in caching module for API responses

rate-limits.comment: Self-hosted has no rate limits; managed hosting limits vary by plan

global-regions.comment: Self-hosted; deploy to any region yourself

free-tier.comment: Core CMS is fully open source and free

pricing-model.comment: Free open source; Pro includes 5 editors + $19/month per additional; Assembly from $499/month for 5 sites

commercial-support.comment: Commercial support with paid plans; dedicated success team and Apostrophe engineers access

enterprise-features.comment: Pro tier includes advanced permissions, version control, design tools, automatic translations
